summary: Requires DHS to submit federal waiver request regarding time limits for certain SNAP recipients under certain circumstances.

title: Homestead credit-payment req. to claimant following sale of qualifying homestead
summary: Requires direct payment of homestead credit to claimant following sale of qualifying homestead and upon claimant request.

title: Carjacking and child prostitution-conviction records shall not be expunged
summary: Provides that records of convictions for carjacking and promoting prostitution of child shall not be expunged.

title: Domestic Viol Victims Legal Asst Fund-estab; add new civil penal, incr surcharge
primary_sponsors: Cruz-Perez, Nilsa I.; Cunningham, Sandra B.
summary: Adds new civil penalties and increases surcharges imposed on domestic violence offenders; establishes "Domestic Violence Victims' Legal Assistance Fund."

title: Fiduciaries-clarifies procedures for resignation, removal and succession
summary: Clarifies procedures for resignation, removal, and succession of fiduciaries.

title: Workers' cooperative societies-concerns
summary: Concerns workers' cooperative societies.

title: Basic Skills Training Prog. for Economic Growth-increases reporting requirements
summary: Increases reporting requirements for the NJ Basic Skills Training Program for Economic Growth.

title: Local trans. projects-DOT compensate for contractual delay damages from shutdown
summary: Requires DOT to compensate local government entities for contractual delay damages resulting from shutdown of transportation projects funded by Transportation Trust Fund; authorizes local government entities to use certain funds for transportation projects.

title: Military installations-provides incentives for certain businesses associated
summary: Provides incentives for certain businesses associated with military installations.

title: Green building-permits developer to qualify for low-interest loan from NJEDA
summary: Permits developer to qualify for low-interest loan from NJEDA when building a high performance green building.

title: Shopping centers, distressed-allows CBT credit as incentive for redevelopment
summary: Allows corporation business tax credits as incentives for redevelopment of distressed shopping centers.

title: Business accelerators and incubators and startup businesses-provides assistance
primary_sponsors: Cruz-Perez, Nilsa I.; Corrado, Kristin M.
summary: Provides assistance to business accelerators and incubators and startup businesses located within those business accelerators and incubators.

title: Student Movement Against Cancer license plates-authorizes creation
summary: Authorizes creation of Student Movement Against Cancer license plates.

title: Medicaid reimbursement rates for brain injury services-establishes
primary_sponsors: Codey, Richard J.; Schepisi, Holly T.
summary: Establishes minimum Medicaid reimbursement rates for brain injury services.

title: Voter registration at polling place on election day-permits
summary: Permits voter registration at polling place on election day.

title: Voter registration-permits up to 14 days prior to election
summary: Permits voter registration up to 14 days before election.

title: Tenant, temporary/permanent restraining order-allow to change locks on unit
primary_sponsors: Turner, Shirley K.; Greenstein, Linda R.
summary: Allows court to authorize domestic violence victim with temporary or permanent restraining order to change locks on residential rental unit.*

title: Superintendent-assume responsibilities of principal in certain school districts
summary: Requires superintendent to assume responsibilities of principal in certain school districts.

title: Graduation requirements, high school-req. to complete financial aid application
primary_sponsors: Turner, Shirley K.; Singer, Robert W.
summary: Requires high school students to complete financial aid applications.*

title: Citizen budget oversight committee-monitor dist. or charter sch. finan. position
summary: Requires Type I school districts and charter schools to establish citizen budget oversight committee to monitor district's or charter school's financial position.

title: Proprietary institutions-phases out tuition aid grants
summary: Phases out State tuition aid grants for students enrolled in proprietary institutions.

title: Students w/disab-sch security drills/emerg situations-req documentation of needs
primary_sponsors: Turner, Shirley K.; Greenstein, Linda R.; Jasey, Mila M.
summary: Requires certain documentation of needs of students with disabilities during school security drills and emergency situations and in school security plans; requires staff training on needs of students with disabilities in emergency planning.

title: Income tax credit for child/dependent care expenses-revises
summary: Revises gross income tax credit for child and dependent care expenses by expanding income eligibility and increasing credit.

title: Lease requirements-require landlord attach certificate of inspection/occupancy
summary: Requires landlord to attach certificate of inspection or occupancy to residential lease.

title: Proprietary school-revoke license, school fails to achieve min. graduation rates
summary: Directs Secretary of Higher Education to revoke proprietary school's license to award academic degrees if school fails to achieve certain minimum graduation rates.

title: Tuition Aid Grant program-expands to part-time undergraduates
summary: Expands Tuition Aid Grant program to part-time undergraduates.

title: Dyslexia-DOE establish pilot program, provide assistive technology to students
summary: Establishes pilot program in DOE to provide assistive technology to elementary and middle school students with dyslexia and related conditions.

title: Marie H Katzenbach Sch For the Deaf Task Force-study issues/make recommendations
summary: Establishes task force to study issues and make recommendations regarding Marie H. Katzenbach School for the Deaf.

title: State monitor and other staff-salary and other costs will be paid by State
summary: Provides that salary and other costs associated with Commissioner of Education's appointment of State monitor and other staff under "School District Fiscal Accountability Act" will be paid by State.

title: Student sun protection-adopt policies on sunscreen use & sun-protective clothing
summary: Requires school districts to adopt policies concerning student use of sunscreen and sun-protective clothing at school and school-sponsored functions.

title: Textbooks, higher education institutions-publishers prov. price and availability
summary: Requires textbook publishers to provide public institutions of higher education with information on price and availability of textbooks.

title: School bus aide-minimum required for every 15 special needs students
summary: Requires minimum of one school bus aide for every 15 special needs students on school bus.

title: Boil water notice-req. by certain public water systems via phone, email or text
summary: Requires boil water notices to be provided by certain public water systems via direct contact.

title: Insurance public contracts & consulting svcs-award thru competitive process
summary: Requires certain public contracts for insurance coverage and consulting services to be awarded through competitive contracting process.

title: Pupil transportation-revise mileage limit for students in preschool thru grade 4
summary: Revises mileage limit for mandatory school transportation for students in preschool through grade four.

title: Marie H. Katzenbach School for the Deaf-extend eligibility for SDA grant funding
summary: Extends eligibility for certain SDA grant funding to Marie H. Katzenbach School for the Deaf.

title: Police basic training-req. cultural diversity & implicit bias training included
summary: Requires cultural diversity and implicit bias training be included in police basic training curriculum.

title: Teaching certification-mandate training on remote teaching for all candidates
summary: Mandates training on remote teaching for all candidates for teaching certification.

title: Higher education transparency-req to disclose status as for-profit businesses
summary: Requires proprietary degree-granting institutions to disclose status as for-profit businesses and requires institutions of higher education and proprietary degree-granting institutions to disclose accreditation status.

title: Alcohol manuf, certain-expands permitted sales & activities on licensed premises
summary: Expands permitted sales and activities on licensed premises of certain alcohol manufacturers.

title: Twelfth Grade Postsecondary Transition Year Pilot Program-establishes
primary_sponsors: Zwicker, Andrew; Greenstein, Linda R.; McKnight, Angela V.
summary: Establishes "Twelfth Grade Postsecondary Transition Year Pilot Program" in Department of Education.

title: Literacy Training Pilot Program-establishes in DOE
summary: Establishes New Jersey Literacy Training Pilot Program in DOE.

title: Police and firefighters-establish a 5 year residency requirement
summary: Permits municipal, county, and regional police and fire forces to establish five-year residency requirement for police officers and firefighters; allows exceptions to requirement under certain circumstances.

title: Hotel/motel occupancy fee-allocate rev. for arts, historical heritage & tourism
summary: Allocates all revenue from hotel and motel occupancy fee for arts, historical heritage, and tourism purposes.

title: Capital improvements, certain-repeal $100K cap on sales & use tax exemption
primary_sponsors: Testa, Michael L.; Gopal, Vin; Ruiz, M. Teresa
summary: Repeals $100,000 cap on sales and use tax exemption for certain capital improvements made by businesses participating in Urban Enterprise Zone program.

title: Missing Persons & Human Trafficking Unit-expands auth; concerns high risk cases
primary_sponsors: Greenstein, Linda R.; Sacco, Nicholas J.; DeAngelo, Wayne P.
summary: Concerns investigation of missing persons cases. *

title: Unemployment offices, State-req DOLWD reopen immediately and remain open
primary_sponsors: Testa, Michael L.; Oroho, Steven V.
summary: Requires DOLWD to take measures to ensure State unemployment offices reopen immediately and remain open during and after public health emergency.

title: Mental health first aid training-St. Bd of Ed incl instruct for pub sch teachers
summary: Requires State Board of Education to include instruction on mental health first aid training as part of professional development requirement for public school teachers.

title: Equity in Education Initiative-estab.; concerns svcs for students w/dyslexia;$2M
summary: Directs Commissioner of Education to establish New Jersey Equity in Education Initiative, appropriates $2,000,000.

title: Trauma-informed education-teaching staff & sch bd members receive training
summary: Requires teaching staff members and school board members to annually receive training on trauma-informed education.

title: Electric vehicle certification prog-auth county vocational school district estab
summary: Authorizes county vocational school districts to establish electric vehicle certification programs.

title: Manufacturing reinvestment account program-incentivize workforce training
summary: Establishes a manufacturing reinvestment account program to incentivize capital investment and workforce training in New Jersey with income tax rate reductions, deferrals, and accelerated deductions.

title: Manufacturing machine/metal trade apprenticeships tax credit program-establish
summary: Establishes manufacturing machine and metal trade apprenticeship tax credit program.

title: Energy efficiency or conservation improvements-small bus. qualify for loans
summary: Permits small businesses to qualify for loans from EDA for costs of energy audit and making energy efficiency or conservation improvements.

title: Utilities, cert-allow resid. customers satisfy outstanding balances over time
summary: Requires certain utilities to allow residential customers to satisfy outstanding balances over time.

title: Disabled veteran, totally/permanently-provide income tax credit for rent
summary: Provides gross income tax credit to certain totally and permanently disabled veterans for rent constituting property taxes.

title: Office of Women's Research and Policy-creates;$150K
summary: Creates the Office on Women's Research and Policy and appropriates $150,000.

title: Business email address-required to report to Div of Revenue & Enterprise Service
summary: Requires businesses to report email address to Division of Revenue and Enterprise Services.

title: Driver's license restoration after suspension-clarifies procedures
summary: Clarifies procedures for restoration of driver's license after suspension; authorizes the court to waive imprisonment under certain circumstances.

title: Decedent's safe-deposit box-revises procedures concerning access
summary: Revises procedures concerning access to decedent's safe-deposit box.

title: Jury duty-clarifies excuse from svc for members of the military or reserve
summary: Clarifies excuse from jury service for members of the military or reserve under certain circumstances; repeals N.J.S.38A:4-6.

title: Manslaughter-upgrades crime to aggravated manslaughter
summary: Upgrades crime of manslaughter to aggravated manslaughter under certain circumstances.

title: Health care service provider-limits rescheduling, cancellation and no-show fees
summary: Limits rescheduling, cancellation, and no-show fees providers of health care services may charge in certain instances.

title: Plenary winery licenses-revises acreage requirements
summary: Revises acreage requirement for plenary winery licenses.

title: Contractors' Registration Act-clarifies insurance and bonding requirement
summary: Concerning the "Contractor's Registration Act."

title: Grab bar installation-required in certain restrooms
summary: Requires installation of grab bars in certain public restrooms.

title: Office parks and retail centers-authorized conversion to mixed-use developments
summary: Authorizes conversion of certain office parks and retail centers to mixed-use developments.

title: MVC service-allow customer to schedule appointment on MVC website
summary: Requires MVC to allow customers to schedule appointments on MVC's website; extends expiration date of certain documents under certain circumstances.

title: MV titles & registrations-permit dealers to facilitate for used MV by priv sale
summary: Permits licensed motor vehicle dealers to facilitate issuance of titles and registrations for used motor vehicles purchased by private sale.

title: Mail-in ballot-req do not forward label; allow voter to cure due to missing cert
primary_sponsors: Bucco, Anthony M.; Testa, Michael L.
summary: Requires do not forward label on mail-in ballot envelopes; allows mail-in voter to cure mail-in ballot due to missing or detached certificate; requires certain voter data be entered into voter file within 30 days.

title: PERS membership, business administrators-makes eligible; provides for transfer
summary: Makes local government business administrators eligible for memberships in PERS; provides for transfer of business administrators from participation in Defined Contribution Retirement Program to membership in PERS.

title: Safe Haven for Protection of Domestic Companion Animals Act
summary: "New Jersey Safe Haven for Protection of Domestic Companion Animals Act."

title: MVC operations during public health emergency-req. measures to prevent closure
summary: Requires MVC to take measures to prevent agency closures during public health emergency; requires MVC to provide alternatives if closure is unpreventable.

title: Police trained in animal cruelty-exempts certain additional training courses
summary: Exempts certain officers trained in animal cruelty from certain additional Police Training Commission training courses.

title: COVID-19 relief programs, federal-req grants be disbursed based on population
summary: Requires grants from federal COVID-19 relief programs be disbursed proportionally based on population.

title: Municipality reimb.-estab. fund for police & sanitation, crowding at MVC;$500K
summary: Establishes fund to reimburse municipalities for police costs related to crowding at MVC sites; appropriates $500,000.

title: Community Emergency Response Team members-perform traffic duties
summary: Permits members of Community Emergency Response Teams to perform traffic duties under certain circumstances.

title: Law enforcement officers, Class 3-provide security in place of religious worship
summary: Authorizes Class Three special law enforcement officers to provide security in places of religious worship; requires nonpublic security aid be used for Class Three officers upon request of nonpublic school.

title: Payroll-reduces taxable wage base applied to certain tax contributions
summary: Reduces taxable wage base applied to certain tax contributions.

title: Pregnancy policy for law enforcement officers-require agencies to adopt
summary: Requires law enforcement agencies to adopt pregnancy policy for law enforcement officers.

title: MVC hours for health care workers & first responders-reserves certain
summary: Reserves certain hours at MVC locations for health care workers and first responders during COVID-19 public health emergency.

title: Medicaid eligibility redeterminations, annual-requires DHS conduct
primary_sponsors: Vitale, Joseph F.; Codey, Richard J.; Stanley, Sterley S.
summary: Requires DHS to conduct annual Medicaid eligibility redeterminations.

title: Campaign contributions-req gubernatorial & leg candidates report within 48 hours
summary: Requires gubernatorial and legislative candidates report contributions within 48 hours of receipt; requires Election Law Enforcement Commission to post reports within 72 hours of filing.

title: Firefighters, certain-permits mun or fire district transfer from PERS to PFRS
summary: Permits municipality, fire district or authority to approve transfer of certain firefighters from PERS to PFRS.

title: Anti-nepotism policies-req. adoption of policies by school dist. and charter sch
summary: Requires adoption of anti-nepotism policies by school districts and charter schools.

title: Research universities-aligns contracting standards for its AC campus
summary: Aligns contracting standards of Stockton University for its Atlantic City campus with those governing State public research universities.

title: Teacher misconduct-DOE collect information and report to the Legislature
summary: Requires DOE to collect information on certain teacher misconduct and report to Legislature.

title: Veterans Day-school districts required to observe as a school holiday
summary: Requires school districts to observe Veterans Day as school holiday.

title: Public safety worker, killed on duty-elim. time limit on tuition benf for spouse
summary: Eliminates eligibility time limit on tuition benefits for spouses of certain public safety workers killed in performance of their duties.

title: Colleges, private-affords civil immunity to and their police officers
summary: Affords civil immunity to private colleges and their police officers in certain cases.

title: Sex offenders, repeat-increases mandatory minimum term of imprisonment
summary: Increases mandatory minimum term of imprisonment for certain repeat sex offenders.

title: S. Jersey Vietnam Vets' Assc-auth lic plate; proceeds, vet, emerg mgmt operation
summary: Authorizes South Jersey Vietnam Veterans' Association license plates with proceeds to veterans' and emergency management operations.

title: Coast Guard-authorize special license plates for members
summary: Authorizes special license plates for members of the United States Coast Guard.

title: Sex offenders-required annual review to determine if they registered and tiered
summary: Requires annual review of all released sex offenders to determine if they were registered and tiered.

title: Voters-estab pilot prog to permit active military service members to use Intenet
summary: Establishes pilot project to permit voters in military service on active duty overseas, and their eligible family members, to vote in certain elections using the Internet; makes appropriation.

title: Tax assessors, newly appointed-designate as professional service contractors
summary: Permits municipalities to designate newly-appointed tax assessors as professional service contractors.

title: Student athlete physical examinations-requires insurance cover
summary: Requires health insurance coverage for certain student athlete physical examinations.

title: Health insur & coronavirus 2019-prov hospitalization coverage w/out cost-sharing
summary: Requires health insurance carriers to provide coverage for hospitalizations resulting from coronavirus disease 2019 without imposing cost-sharing requirements.

title: Transportation network company-provide live customer service representative
summary: Requires transportation network company to provide live customer service representative and certain notification to riders.

title: Vaccine mandates & elig for unemp benefits, certain health care workers-concerns
summary: Concerns vaccine mandates and eligibility for unemployment benefits for certain health care workers.

title: Veterinarian expenses-provides income tax deduction for
summary: Provides a gross income tax deduction for veterinarian expenses.

title: Binding arbitration dispute-St agency, will not enter into contract w/bus entity
summary: Provides State agencies will not enter into contracts with business entities that require persons or public entities to submit disputes to binding arbitration.

title: Income tax agreements, reciprocal w/other states-restricts auth. to terminate
summary: Restricts authority to terminate reciprocal personal income tax agreements with other states.

title: Sales tax holiday-establish first weekend of August for certain retail sales
summary: Establishes annual sales tax holiday during first weekend of August for certain retail sales of computers, school computer supplies, school supplies, school art supplies, and school instructional materials.

summary: Establishes annual sales tax holiday for certain sales of personal computers and certain sales of school supplies and equipment during first full weekend of August.

title: Buprenorphine-req health benefits coverage for pain treatment w/out step therapy
summary: Requires health benefits coverage for buprenorphine and buprenorphine/naloxone for pain treatment without step therapy or fail-first protocols.

title: Retail food establishment-DOH establish uniform standards
summary: Requires DOH to establish uniform standards for retail food establishment health and sanitary evaluation placards.

title: Recyclable products-prohibit sale/distribution/import unless widely recycled
summary: Prohibits sale, distribution, and import of certain products marketed as recyclable, unless DEP determines that products are widely recycled.

title: Meal prog-sch dist take action to increase participation in free/reduced priced
summary: Requires school districts take certain actions to increase participation in free or reduced priced meal programs; prohibits shaming students with school meal bills in arrears; prohibits certain district actions in collecting unpaid school meal fees.

title: Superintendents of weights and measures, certain-concerns appointment
summary: Concerns appointment of certain superintendents of weights and measures.

title: Homestead property tax reimbursement-revises criteria to establish base year
summary: Revises criteria to establish base year for homestead property tax reimbursement after relocation.

title: Homestead property tax reimb prog-lowers age of eligibility for surviving spouse
summary: Lowers age of eligibility for surviving spouse under homestead property tax reimbursement program.

title: Elderly relative-$3K income tax deduction for taxpayers providing home care
summary: Provides $3,000 gross income tax deduction for certain taxpayers providing home care for an elderly relative.

title: Excused absences, mental/behavioral health reasons-req. school district permit 5
primary_sponsors: Codey, Richard J.; Cryan, Joseph P.
summary: Requires school districts to permit students five excused absences for mental or behavioral health reasons.

title: School buses, Type S-authorizes certain individuals to drive
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Thompson, Samuel D.
summary: Authorizes certain individuals to drive Type S school buses.

title: School bus drivers-auth. schools to administer commercial driver license exam
primary_sponsors: Singer, Robert W.; Thompson, Samuel D.
summary: Authorizes schools to administer commercial driver license exam and other motor vehicle services for school bus drivers.

title: Controlled Dangerous Substances Act-add illicit fentanyls to Schedule 1
summary: Adds illicit fentanyls to Schedule I in the "New Jersey Controlled Dangerous Substances Act."

title: SNAP benefit, supplemental-req issue $15 to sr citizens & disabled enrollees
summary: Establishes State SNAP Minimum Benefit Program; appropriates $18 million to DHS.*

title: Civil svc.-permits instit. of layoffs, requires exam be offered continual basis
summary: Makes various changes to civil service; permits institution of temporary layoffs; permits government entities to opt-out of civil service; requires civil service examinations be offered on continual basis.

title: Bd of Ed of limited purpose regional sch dist memb vacancy-fill by majority vote
summary: Provides that in certain cases vacancy in membership of board of education of limited purpose regional school district will be filled by majority vote of board of education of constituent district represented by former board member.

title: Playgrounds, completely inclusive-approp $3M from American Rescue Plan Act, 2021
summary: Appropriates $3 million in federal funding from "American Rescue Plan Act of 2021" to DEP for construction of completely inclusive playgrounds.

title: Drinking water wastewater & stormwater infra projects-grants to local govt;$100M
summary: Makes $100 million in federal funds available to DEP for grants to local governments for drinking water, wastewater, and stormwater infrastructure projects.

title: St agencies-vacate cert prop. in Trenton, EDA offer incentives to pub entities
summary: Requires State agencies to vacate certain property in Trenton; allows EDA to offer incentives to private entities to locate to that property.

title: President-candidate req to disclose fed. income tax return to appear on ballot
summary: Requires candidates for President and Vice-President of United States to disclose federal income tax returns to appear on ballot; prohibits Electoral College electors from voting for candidates who fail to file income tax returns.

title: Charter school prog-makes changes to enrollment, charter revocation & monitoring
summary: Makes various changes in the charter school program in regard to student enrollment procedures, charter revocation, and monitoring of charter schools.

title: Teachers, principal, asst/vice principal-elim use of standardized assess in eval
summary: Eliminates use of standardized assessments as measure of student growth or progress in evaluations of teachers, principals, assistant principals, and vice-principals.

title: Higher ed instit undergrad-prohibits from increasing tuition by more than 4%
summary: Prohibits public institutions of higher education from increasing resident undergraduate tuition by more than 4 percent over the prior academic year.

title: Deadly force-establishes requirements for use
summary: Establishes requirements for use of deadly force.

title: Elderly or disabled victims-upgrades assault
summary: Upgrades assault on victims who are elderly or disabled.

title: Development impact fees-authorizes municipal assessment, following St guidelines
summary: Authorizes municipal assessment of development impact fees following State guidelines and makes an appropriation.

title: Municipal redevelopment powers-enhances transparency in exercise
primary_sponsors: Turner, Shirley K.; Stack, Brian P.
summary: Enhances transparency in exercise of municipal redevelopment powers.

title: Emergency & provisional ballot-permit use of uniform ballot for emerg. purposes
summary: Permits use of uniform ballot for emergency and provisional ballot purposes.

title: Winery salesrooms-makes various changes to law governing
summary: Makes various changes to law governing winery salesrooms.

title: School district noncertificated employee-provides same mil. svc. credit for comp
summary: Provides same military service credit for compensation purposes to noncertificated employees of school districts that is provided to certificated employees under current law.

title: Adult education programs for residents-creates pilot program to fund
summary: Creates pilot program to fund adult education programs for residents of certain communities.

title: Students-prohibits certain campaign literature that promotes favors
summary: Prohibits distribution to students of literature that promotes, favors, or opposes candidacy of any candidate for election at any general, municipal, or school election.

title: Senior citizen housing proj-landlord prov written explanation for rent increase
primary_sponsors: Madden, Fred H.; Greenstein, Linda R.
summary: Requires landlord to provide written explanation for rent increase on tenant of senior citizen housing project.

title: County police department and force-provide police services to municipalities
summary: Permits county police department and force to provide police services to municipalities.

title: Legal rep. in removal/eviction proceeding-provides for resid lessees & tenants
summary: Provides for legal representation for residential lessees and tenants in any removal or eviction proceeding.

title: Nursing homes-DOH estab process, independent informal dispute resolution hearing
summary: Establishes process for independent informal dispute resolution hearings in DOH.

title: Buprenorphine-requires Medicaid preferred drug list, coverage for chronic pain
summary: Requires Medicaid preferred drug lists to provide for coverage of buprenorphine for treatment of chronic pain.

title: Omnibus driver-inspect bus at end of route for passengers w/disabilities
summary: Requires omnibus drivers to inspect bus at end of route for passengers with disabilities.

title: Military sash-allow graduating student to wear while participating in ceremony
summary: Requires school district to allow graduating student to wear military sash while participating in high school graduation ceremony.

title: General obligation bonds by loc. units-requires pub referendum prior to issuance
summary: Requires public referendum prior to issuance of general obligation bonds by local units.

title: Firearm ID cards and handgun purchase permits-auth chiefs to issue
summary: Authorizes chiefs of part-time municipal police forces to issue firearms ID cards and handgun purchase permits.

title: Motor vehicles, not required to be inspected-MVC issue exempt certificate
summary: Requires motor vehicle commission to issue exempt certificates for motor vehicles not required to be inspected.

title: Energy storage systems, new-req. BPU develop program to incentivize installation
summary: Establishes incentive program for installation of energy storage systems.*

title: Invasive plant species-prohibits sale distribution or propagation without permit
summary: Prohibits sale, distribution, import, export or propagation of certain invasive species without permit from Department of Agriculture; establishes NJ Invasive Species Council.**

title: Shipping box size-proh use of box greater than 2 times volume of product shipped
summary: Prohibits use by certain retailers of shipping box greater than two times volume of product being shipped.

title: Digital Divide Solutions Grant Program-estab, assist pub sch for Internet access
summary: Establishes Digital Divide Solutions Grant Program in DOE to assist public schools in purchase of connected devices and Internet access for students during periods of remote instruction.

title: School attendance-require studies on impact of COVID-19
summary: Requires studies on impact of COVID-19 pandemic on elementary and secondary school attendance and higher education enrollment.

title: Mental Health Awareness Pilot Program-establish in DOE
summary: Establishes Mental Health Awareness Pilot Program in DOE.

title: Atlantic City International Airport-concerns certain employee benefits
summary: Requires preservation of employee benefits and contractual rights as condition of sale of Atlantic City International Airport.

title: County Tourism Incentive Grant Fund-establishes
summary: Establishes "County Tourism Incentive Grant Fund" within Department of Treasury to provide funding for grants to counties to support tourism advertising and promotion.

title: Mail-in ballot-concerns opening inner envelopes up to 5 days prior to election
summary: Permits county board of elections to open inner envelopes containing mail-in ballots up to five days prior to date of an election.

title: Graduation req., high sch.-req student complete free application for student aid
summary: Requires students to complete free application for federal student aid as part of high school graduation requirements or request an exemption.

title: College Mental Health Services Act-grant prog., concerns mental health on campus
primary_sponsors: Corrado, Kristin M.; Cunningham, Sandra B.
summary: "College Mental Health Services Act"; establishes grant program for public institutions of higher education and requires public institutions of higher education to report certain information concerning mental health treatment and suicides.

title: Asbestos violations-increase max penalty; allocates moneys to control & lic prog
summary: Increases maximum penalty for certain violations concerning asbestos hazard abatement; allocates moneys from increased penalties to asbestos programs.

title: Dogs-permits visiting at State veteran's residential facilities
summary: Permits dogs to visit at State veterans' residential facilities.

title: Twice exceptional students-proh. special ed. due to average academic performance
summary: Prohibits twice exceptional students from being denied special education and related services due to average academic performance.

title: Community College Opportunity Grant Prog-permit adult student receive finan asst
summary: Modifies Community College Opportunity Grant Program to permit adult students enrolled in postsecondary career and technical education programs to receive financial assistance.

title: Lead or asbestos hazard abatement, primary residency-gross income tax deduction
summary: Allows gross income tax deduction for amounts paid for removal of lead, asbestos, sodium, chloride, and other contaminants from taxpayer's property.

title: Disabled veterans-exempts from certain fees at State parks and forests
summary: Exempts disabled veterans from certain fees at State parks and forests.

title: Spaying & neutering prog-expands elig. for reduced cost to any disab State resid
summary: Expands eligibility for reduced-cost spaying and neutering program to any disabled State resident.

title: Wood burning units, outdoor-permits DEP air quality regulation
summary: Permits DEP air quality regulation of certain outdoor wood burning units only in response to complaint.

title: Black flies, along Delaware River-DEP provide for annual suppression
summary: Requires DEP to provide for annual suppression of black flies along Delaware River.

title: Senior citizens-provide discounted hunting and trapping licenses, permit fees
summary: Provides discounted hunting and trapping license, permit, and stamp fees for senior citizens.

title: Home-school students-allow participation in school-sponsored activities
summary: Requires school districts to allow home-schooled students to participate in school-sponsored extracurricular activities in the student's resident district.

title: Electronic Publication Legal Notices Act-legal notices permitted on websites
summary: "Electronic Publication of Legal Notices Act"; permits publication of legal notices by government agencies and persons on official government notice websites instead of newspapers.

title: Property, adjoining-permits entry to make improvements or repairs
summary: Permits entry on adjoining property to make improvements or repairs in certain situations.

title: MVC-removes authority to increase fees; sets certain fees by statute
summary: Removes authority of MVC to increase certain fees; sets certain fees by statute.

title: Dogs-allowed in sampling and tasting areas of breweries
summary: Allows dogs in sampling and tasting areas of breweries.

title: Animal Advocate Program-establishes in AOC
summary: Establishes Animal Advocate Program in AOC.

title: Police community roundtables-require to hold two on police relations each year

summary: Requires chief law enforcement officer of municipal police departments to hold two community roundtables on police relations each year.

title: Eviction actions, confidentiality-provides exception for Legal Svcs & other orgs
primary_sponsors: Stack, Brian P.; Ruiz, M. Teresa
summary: Provides exception for Legal Services of New Jersey and other public interest organizations from confidentiality of certain eviction actions.

title: Operation Uphold Democracy-extends certain PERS benefits to verterans
summary: Extends certain PERS benefits to veterans of "Operation Uphold Democracy".

title: Rowan University-authorizes issuance of alumni license plates
summary: Authorizes issuance of special license plates for alumni of four-year public institutions of higher education.*

title: Inheritance taxes transfer on brother and sister of decedent-eliminates
summary: Eliminates transfer inheritance taxes on brothers and sisters of a decedent.

title: State expenditure Internet website-State Treasurer to org./publish contract data
summary: Requires State Treasurer to organize and publish certain contract and grant data and information on State expenditure Internet website.
